name: Commonwealth Bank Of Australia.
analysis: CBA has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 11% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$165.2300, stop A$154.8558, target A$185.5900 (1.96:1) — then trail it.
